algorithm: Introduce a new algorithm called "Time-aware Fastest Next Node Selection Algorithm" that considers time windows and minimizes the time for the last truck to finish by prioritizing the closest node that can be visited within its time window or waiting at a node if necessary.

Create an algorithm that selects the next node by considering the ratio of the remaining unvisited customers to the total number of customers, and adjusts the truck speed dynamically based on this ratio to optimize overall completion time for all trucks.

Dynamic speed adjustment based on remaining customers is the key idea. Based on this, the new algorithm dynamically updates the waiting time at each node based on the number of unvisited customers left to optimize the overall completion time for all trucks.
Create a novel algorithm that dynamically updates the travel speed of the trucks based on the number of unvisited customers left, in order to optimize the overall completion time for all trucks.
New algorithm description: Utilizing a Weighted Time Calculation based on Distance and Time Windows to determine the best node for the next truck position.
